title: Adrenal Fatigue vs. Burnout After 40: What Is the Difference?
author: Happy Aging Team
primary_keyword: adrenal fatigue vs burnout women over 40
meta_title: Adrenal Fatigue vs. Burnout After 40: What Is the Difference?
meta_description: Adrenal fatigue and burnout share symptoms but need different solutions. Learn how to tell them apart, why women over 40 are most vulnerable, and how to recover from each.
